title: Process Card
description: Structural schema companion for contract: process-run/v0. The card is the discovery root for one running process: its identity, its telemetry stream, and its control channel. The prose standard remains normative; liveness/staleness and token verification are enforced by consumers.

capabilities.description: Host-less capability tokens. Must include the exact opaque process-run contract token.

run_id.description: Run identity, unique within the runtime directory. Producer-assigned.

pid.description: OS process id. Identity is the (pid, started_at) PAIR — pid alone is reusable.

started_at.description: Process start time (RFC3339, UTC). Paired with pid for PID-reuse-safe identity.

profile.description: Producer profile id governing payload shapes (e.g. example.pipeline-run/v0).

path.description: Absolute path of the append-only event stream for this run.

socket.description: Absolute path of the local control socket (Unix domain socket or platform named pipe).

key_file.description: Absolute path of the invocation-key file (owner-only permissions). The card carries the path, never the key.

verbs.description: Verbs this process serves. Core verbs have contract semantics; x- verbs are producer-specific.
